records.ety: [OF. sustenance, sostenance, soustenance: cf. L. sustenentia endurance. See Sustain.]

defs: The act of sustaining; support; maintenance; subsistence; as, the sustenance of the body; the sustenance of life.
That which supports life; food; victuals; provisions; means of living; as, the city has ample sustenance.
quotes: For lying is thy sustenance, thy food.
